diff: Until the Powerhouse system supports submitting Artifact Edit Proposals, AGENT5 token holders may submit Artifact Edit Proposals by posting them to the Sky Forum under the "Launch Agent 5 Prime" category. The title of the post must include the text "Launch Agent 5 Artifact Edit Proposal". The post must include cryptographic proof that the author controls an account holding the required percentage of the total AGENT5 token supply specified in Root Edit Proposal Submission.
